description: The §7.3 check-4b happy path. child_binding_sig is a real ECDSA-P-256 signature by the attested leaf K_bind over JCS{v, child_ed25519_pub, child_x25519_pub, provisioning_nonce}, and the body's pubkeys + nonce match what the parent presents. The verifier MUST accept check 4b (and, with a good chain, proceed toward the §7.4 SAS).

notes.signing_input: RFC 8785 JCS of the object above (keys sorted UTF-16; the single shared Canonical) — bytes the child K_bind signs and the parent re-derives verbatim
notes.child_binding_sig: hex(DER ECDSA-P-256 / SHA-256) by the leaf K_bind public key
notes.child_attestation_cert_chain: DEFERRED: a real Pixel-7 STRONGBOX chain over K_bind rides the ADR-032 bench-confirm capture (ADR-037 D5). The executable check-4b accept is proven host-side in AttestationVerifierRealCryptoTest with a P-256 twin signer.

expect: ACCEPTED (check 4b) — the signature verifies against the leaf K_bind over the matching JCS body
